channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ARTSONEN] Artson Board to meet on Apr 28 for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
Artson Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with the company's Code of Conduct for prevention of Insider Trading, the trading window for dealing in Artson's securities has been closed from March 23, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the public disclosure of the aforementioned financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 28, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 and FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Trading window closed from March 23, 2026.
  • Closure until 48 hours post results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARTSON ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TALWALKARS] Talwalkars Board Approves New Auditors, CS & Registered Office Shift
item.description:
Talwalkars Better Value Fitness Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on April 14, 2026, approved several key changes. The company's registered office will shift from Bandra West to Andheri West, Mumbai. M/s. S K Bhavsar & Co. was appointed as Statutory Auditors for FY 2026-27, with authorization to audit pending financial statements up to February 26, 2026. Ms. Pooja Jain's resignation as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer was noted, and Mr. Kamlesh Laxmanbhai Bachani was appointed as her successor. Additionally, M/s Pooja M Patel & Associates were appointed as Secretarial Auditor for a five-year term, and M/s. Kishan Patel & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.

  • Board approved shifting of registered office to Andheri West, Mumbai.
  • M/s. S K Bhavsar & Co. appointed as Statutory Auditors for FY27.
  • Ms. Pooja Jain resigned as CS; Mr. Kamlesh Bachani appointed new CS.
  • Secretarial and Internal Auditors also appointed for respective terms.
  • Statutory Auditors authorized to audit pending past financial statements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Talwalkars Better Value Fitness Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [CONTAINE] Pushpa Bhaju acquires 10.72% stake in Containe Tech via warrant conversion
item.description:
Pushpa Bhaju has acquired 7,50,000 equity shares, representing 10.72% of Containe Technologies Ltd's expanded paid-up capital. This acquisition resulted from the conversion of warrants issued on a preferential basis. Post-acquisition, Pushpa Bhaju, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PACs), now holds a total of 8,33,000 shares. The company's equity share capital increased from ₹6.24 crore to ₹6.99 crore due to this conversion. This disclosure is made under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Pushpa Bhaju acquired 7,50,000 shares in Containe Technologies.
  • The acquisition represents a 10.72% stake in the expanded capital.
  • Shares were acquired through conversion of preferential warrants.
  • Total equity share capital increased from ₹6.24 Cr to ₹6.99 Cr.
  • Acquirer's total holding with PACs is now 8,33,000 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Containe Technologies Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [SCHAEFFLER] Schaeffler India Board to meet April 29 for Q4 FY26 results
item.description:
Schaeffler India Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the unaudited financial results, both standalone and consolidated, for the quarter that ended on March 31, 2026. In compliance with insider trading regulations, the trading window for the company's shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 1, 2026 (inclusive).

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 FY26 unaudited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 1, 2026.
  • Closure is for compliance with insider trading code.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Schaeffler India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHRIDINE] Shri Dinesh Mills clarifies price movement is market-driven
item.description:
Shri Dinesh Mills Ltd. responded to an email from BSE Ltd. regarding significant price movement in its securities. The company clarified that it has consistently disclosed all price-sensitive information as per SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, and confirmed that no announcements or disclosures are currently pending that could impact the share price. The company attributes the recent significant price movement to purely market-driven factors and prevalent market conditions. Furthermore, it confirmed that none of its Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs), Promoters, Promoter Group, or Directors are involved in trading the company's securities.

  • BSE sought clarification on significant price movement.
  • Company confirms all price-sensitive disclosures made.
  • No pending announcements that could impact share price.
  • Price movement attributed solely to market conditions.
  • KMPs, Promoters, Directors are not trading company securities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHRI DINESH MILLS LTD.-$ | Category: Clarification

item.title: [BAJAJCON*] Bajaj Consumer Care receives NCLT order for Scheme of Arrangement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd has received the certified true copy of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Jaipur Bench's order sanctioning the Scheme of Arrangement. This scheme involves Vishal Personal Care Limited (the Demerged Company) and Bajaj Consumer Care Limited (the Resulting Company) and their respective shareholders. The company received the order via email on April 13, 2026, and will collect the physical copy shortly. The Scheme will become effective upon filing the certified NCLT order with the Registrar of Companies, marking a significant step in the corporate restructuring process.

  • NCLT order received for Scheme of Arrangement.
  • Scheme involves Vishal Personal Care and Bajaj Consumer Care.
  • Order sanctioning the demerger was received on April 13, 2026.
  • Scheme to be effective after filing with Registrar of Companies.
  • Marks progress in corporate restructuring.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd | Category: Divestment

item.title: [TALWALKARS] Talwalkars appoints S K Bhavsar & Co. as Statutory Auditor
item.description:
Talwalkars Better Value Fitness Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on April 14, 2026, approved several key changes. M/s. S K Bhavsar & Co. was appointed as the Statutory Auditor for FY 2026-27, subject to shareholder approval, and authorized to audit pending financial statements up to February 26, 2026. The Board also approved the appointment of M/s Pooja M Patel & Associates as Secretarial Auditor for a five-year term and M/s. Kishan Patel & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. Additionally, the company's Registered Office was shifted to a new address in Andheri West, Mumbai. Ms. Pooja Jain's resignation as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer was noted, and Mr. Kamlesh Laxmanbhai Bachani was appointed as her successor.

  • S K Bhavsar & Co. appointed as Statutory Auditor for FY26-27.
  • Pooja M Patel & Associates appointed Secretarial Auditor for 5 years.
  • Kishan Patel & Associates appointed Internal Auditor for FY26-27.
  • Company Secretary changed; Mr. Kamlesh Bachani appointed.
  • Registered office shifted to a new Mumbai address.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Talwalkars Better Value Fitness Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [ALTIUSINVIT] Altius Telecom Infra Trust: Zero Investor Complaints in Q4 FY26
item.description:
Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust has submitted its Investor Grievance Report for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The report, filed pursuant to SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, indicates that there were zero investor complaints pending at the beginning or end of the quarter/year, and zero complaints received or disposed of during both periods. This includes both general and SCORES complaints, demonstrating efficient investor grievance redressal. The report was issued by KFin Technologies Limited, the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, and is available on the Trust's website.

  • Zero investor complaints pending at the beginning of Q4 FY26.
  • No new investor complaints received during Q4 FY26.
  • Zero investor complaints pending at the end of Q4 FY26.
  • The Trust reported zero complaints for the full financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Report filed in compliance with SEBI InvIT Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [STARHFL] Star Housing Finance appoints auditor for NHB snap audit
item.description:
Star Housing Finance Ltd has appointed Ahmedabad-based M/s. Parikh & Associates, Chartered Accountants, to conduct a comprehensive external audit. This audit is in response to a Snap Audit Report issued by the National Housing Bank (NHB). The company clarified that the matter under review is currently at the suspicion stage, and the existence of irregularities has not yet been substantiated. The audit aims to objectively and independently establish the facts, reflecting the Board's and Management's commitment to transparency, accountability, and high standards of corporate governance.

  • SHFL appoints M/s. Parikh & Associates for external audit.
  • Audit addresses NHB's Snap Audit Report.
  • Irregularities are currently unproven suspicions.
  • Move reflects commitment to transparency and governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Star Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [SWATIPRO] Swati Projects Clarifies No Price-Sensitive Info Behind Share Movement
item.description:
Swati Projects Ltd responded to an inquiry from the stock exchange regarding significant movement in its share price. The company clarified that there is no pending or undisclosed price-sensitive information or announcement that could explain the observed price behavior. Swati Projects stated that the movement in its share price is purely due to market conditions and is market-driven, over which the company has no control or knowledge of the reasons. The company further assured that it will comply with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, by duly informing the stock exchange(s) of all required information/announcements as and when necessary.

  • Swati Projects received exchange inquiry on share price movement.
  • Company denies any pending price-sensitive information.
  • Share price movement attributed to market conditions.
  • Assures compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations for disclosures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swati Projects Ltd | Category: Clarification
